# bigcompute.science

> Open computational mathematics lab. GPU clusters, CUDA kernels, open data. Human-AI collaborative. Not peer-reviewed.

All work produced through human-AI collaboration (Cahlen Humphreys + Claude). No results independently peer-reviewed. All claims grounded in reproducible code and open data. CC BY 4.0.

## Experiments

- [Zaremba 210B Verification](/experiments/zaremba-conjecture-verification/): 210B denominators verified, zero failures. Conditional framework to all d. (complete)
- [Zaremba Transfer Operator](/experiments/zaremba-transfer-operator/): Hausdorff dimension, spectral gaps, property (tau). (complete)
- [Ramsey R(5,5)](/experiments/ramsey-r55-lower-bound/): 656/656 K42 colorings UNSAT. Structural attack on R(5,5)<=45. (in-progress)
- [Class Numbers](/experiments/class-numbers-real-quadratic/): 30B discriminants for real quadratic fields. Cohen-Lenstra at scale. (in-progress)
- [Kronecker Coefficients](/experiments/kronecker-coefficients-gpu/): S_20 and S_30 complete. 26.4B nonzero triples. (in-progress)
- [Ramanujan Machine](/experiments/ramanujan-machine-gpu/): GPU polynomial CF evaluation + PSLQ constant matching. (in-progress)
- [Hausdorff Spectrum](/experiments/hausdorff-dimension-spectrum/): dim_H for all 2^20-1 subsets of {1,...,20}. (complete)
- [Lyapunov Spectrum](/experiments/lyapunov-exponent-spectrum/): Lyapunov exponents for all 2^20-1 subsets. (complete)
- [Minkowski Spectrum](/experiments/minkowski-spectrum/): Multifractal singularity spectrum of ?(x). (complete)
- [Flint Hills Series](/experiments/flint-hills-series/): Partial sums to 10^10, spike decomposition. (complete)
- [MCTS Proof Search](/experiments/mcts-proof-search-benchmark/): LLM theorem proving benchmark. (planned)

## Findings

- [Zaremba Density Phase Transition](/findings/zaremba-density-phase-transition/): A={1,2,3} has exactly 27 exceptions to 10^9. Phase transition at Hausdorff dim=1/2. (high)
- [Kronecker S_30](/findings/kronecker-s30-largest-computation/): 26.4B nonzero triples, 7.4 min on B200. (notable)
- [Cohen-Lenstra Convergence](/findings/class-number-convergence/): h=1 rate drops from 42% to 15%, non-monotone. (notable)
- [Zaremba Proof Framework](/findings/zaremba-conjecture-proved/): Computer-assisted, D0=3.4e10, NOT peer-reviewed. (critical)
- [Spectral Gaps Uniform](/findings/zaremba-spectral-gaps-uniform/): All 1214 moduli positive, min 0.237. (high)
- [Transitivity All Primes](/findings/zaremba-transitivity-all-primes/): Dickson classification, AI-assisted. (high)
- [Witness Golden Ratio](/findings/zaremba-witness-golden-ratio/): a/d concentrates at 1/(5+phi). (medium)
- [Cayley Diameters](/findings/zaremba-cayley-diameters/): diam(p) <= 2 log(p) for 669 primes. (high)
- [GPU 175x Speedup](/findings/gpu-matrix-enumeration-175x/): Batched 2x2 matrix multiply. (medium)
- [Digit 1 Dominance](/findings/hausdorff-digit-one-dominance/): 5 digits with 1 beat 19 without. (medium)
- [Exception Hierarchy](/findings/zaremba-exception-hierarchy/): 27 exceptions decompose to 2 (d=54,150) with digit 4, then 0 with digit 5. (notable)
- [Representation Growth](/findings/zaremba-representation-growth/): R(d) grows as d^0.674. (medium)

## Datasets

- [Class Numbers (HF)](https://huggingface.co/datasets/cahlen/class-numbers-real-quadratic): 2.74B discriminants, Parquet
- [Kronecker Coefficients (HF)](https://huggingface.co/datasets/cahlen/kronecker-coefficients): S_20 + S_30, 370 GB
- [Continued Fraction Spectra (HF)](https://huggingface.co/datasets/cahlen/continued-fraction-spectra): Hausdorff, Lyapunov, Minkowski, Flint Hills
- [Zaremba Data (HF)](https://huggingface.co/datasets/cahlen/zaremba-conjecture-data): Dolgopyat profile, representation counts

## Source Code

- [Experiment code](https://github.com/cahlen/idontknow): CUDA kernels, Python harnesses
- [Website source](https://github.com/cahlen/bigcompute.science): Astro + KaTeX
- [Agent guide](https://github.com/cahlen/idontknow/blob/main/AGENTS.md): How to contribute
- [Citation](https://github.com/cahlen/idontknow/blob/main/CITATION.cff): CITATION.cff
- [MCP Server](https://mcp.bigcompute.science/mcp): Model Context Protocol endpoint for AI agents (no auth)

## Optional

- [Mathematicians](/mathematicians/): Profiles of the mathematicians whose work we build on
- [Interactive](/interactive/): Live visualizations of computational results
- [About](/about/): Project mission and team
- [RSS](/rss.xml): All updates feed
- [Full structured data](/llms-full.txt): Machine-readable YAML with all constants, parameters, and results
